Overgrow.name: Overgrow
Overgrow.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Grass-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

Chlorophyll.name: Chlorophyll
Chlorophyll.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat in harsh sunlight.

Thick Fat.name: Thick Fat
Thick Fat.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire- and Ice-type moves.

Blaze.name: Blaze
Blaze.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Fire-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

Solar Power.name: Solar Power
Solar Power.description: In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 50%, but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn.

Tough Claws.name: Tough Claws
Tough Claws.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's contact moves by 30%.

Drought.name: Drought
Drought.description: Summons harsh sunlight for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Torrent.name: Torrent
Torrent.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Water-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

Rain Dish.name: Rain Dish
Rain Dish.description: The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain.

Mega Launcher.name: Mega Launcher
Mega Launcher.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's pulse moves by 50%.

Swarm.name: Swarm
Swarm.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Bug-type moves by 50% when its HP drops to 1/3 or less of its max.

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's critical hits by 125% instead of 50%.

Adaptability.name: Adaptability
Adaptability.description: Boosts the power of moves of the same type as the Pokémon by 100% instead of 50%.

Keen Eye.name: Keen Eye
Keen Eye.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to targets' evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered.

Tangled Feet.name: Tangled Feet
Tangled Feet.description: Doubles the Pokémon's evasiveness if it is confused.

Big Pecks.name: Big Pecks
Big Pecks.description: The Pokémon's Defense stat cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or Abilities.

No Guard.name: No Guard
No Guard.description: The accuracy of moves used both by and against the Pokémon becomes 100%.

Intimidate.name: Intimidate
Intimidate.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it lowers the Attack stats of opponents by 1 stage.

Shed Skin.name: Shed Skin
Shed Skin.description: The Pokémon has a 30% chance of curing its own status conditions at the end of every turn.

Unnerve.name: Unnerve
Unnerve.description: Makes opponents unable to eat Berries.

Static.name: Static
Static.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being paralyzed.

Lightning Rod.name: Lightning Rod
Lightning Rod.description: The Pokémon draws in all Electric-type moves. These moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage.

Surge Surfer.name: Surge Surfer
Surge Surfer.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

Cute Charm.name: Cute Charm
Cute Charm.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of gaining the Infatuated status if the attacker and the Pokémon are of opposite genders.

Magic Guard.name: Magic Guard
Magic Guard.description: The Pokémon takes damage only from attacks.

Unaware.name: Unaware
Unaware.description: The Pokémon ignores the target's stat changes when attacking, and ignores the attacker's stat changes when being attacked. It cannot ignore changes to the Speed stat, however.

Magic Bounce.name: Magic Bounce
Magic Bounce.description: Instead of being affected by other Pokémon's status moves, the Pokémon bounces them back at the user.

Flash Fire.name: Flash Fire
Flash Fire.description: Fire-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they give the Pokémon the Flash Fire status, which boosts the power of Fire-type moves by 50%.

Snow Cloak.name: Snow Cloak
Snow Cloak.description: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness by 25% in snow.

Snow Warning.name: Snow Warning
Snow Warning.description: Summons snow for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Justified.name: Justified
Justified.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a Dark-type move, its Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Rock Head.name: Rock Head
Rock Head.description: The Pokémon will not lose HP due to recoil damage from its moves.

Synchronize.name: Synchronize
Synchronize.description: If the Pokémon is burned, paralyzed, poisoned, or badly poisoned by another Pokémon's move or Ability, that Pokémon will also be inflicted with the same status condition.

Inner Focus.name: Inner Focus
Inner Focus.description: The Pokémon never flinches when attacked and is unaffected by Intimidate.

Trace.name: Trace
Trace.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it changes its Ability to match that of an opponent.

Guts.name: Guts
Guts.description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%. Being burned does not halve the damage dealt by the Pokémon's physical moves.

Steadfast.name: Steadfast
Steadfast.description: When the Pokémon flinches, its Speed stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Gluttony.name: Gluttony
Gluttony.description: If the Pokémon is holding a Berry to be eaten when its HP drops to 1/4 or less of its max, it will instead eat the Berry when its HP drops to 1/2 or less of its max.

Innards Out.name: Innards Out
Innards Out.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move that knocks it out, it deals the same amount of damage to the attacker.

Oblivious.name: Oblivious
Oblivious.description: The Pokémon cannot gain the Infatuated or Taunted statuses and is unaffected by Intimidate.

Own Tempo.name: Own Tempo
Own Tempo.description: The Pokémon cannot become confused and is unaffected by Intimidate.

Regenerator.name: Regenerator
Regenerator.description: The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it switches out of battle.

Shell Armor.name: Shell Armor
Shell Armor.description: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

Quick Draw.name: Quick Draw
Quick Draw.description: The Pokémon's moves have a 30% chance of going first among moves of the same priority.

Cursed Body.name: Cursed Body
Cursed Body.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, the attacker has a 30% chance of gaining the Move Disabled status for 4 turns.

Shadow Tag.name: Shadow Tag
Shadow Tag.description: Opponents cannot be switched out of battle.

Early Bird.name: Early Bird
Early Bird.description: The Pokémon awakens from sleep twice as fast as other Pokémon.

Scrappy.name: Scrappy
Scrappy.description: The Pokémon can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves. It is also unaffected by Intimidate.

Parental Bond.name: Parental Bond
Parental Bond.description: The parent and child attack one after the other. The power of the child's attacks is 1/4 of those of the parent.

Illuminate.name: Illuminate
Illuminate.description: The Pokémon ignores changes to targets' evasiveness and its accuracy cannot be lowered.

Natural Cure.name: Natural Cure
Natural Cure.description: The Pokémon's status conditions are cured when it switches out of battle.

Analytic.name: Analytic
Analytic.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's moves by 30% when the Pokémon is the last to move that turn.

Huge Power.name: Huge Power
Huge Power.description: Doubles the power of the Pokémon's physical moves.

Hyper Cutter.name: Hyper Cutter
Hyper Cutter.description: The Pokémon's Attack stat cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or Abilities.

Mold Breaker.name: Mold Breaker
Mold Breaker.description: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the Ability of the target (with certain exceptions).

Moxie.name: Moxie
Moxie.description: When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its Attack stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Aerilate.name: Aerilate
Aerilate.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Anger Point.name: Anger Point
Anger Point.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat to its sixth stage when the Pokémon takes a critical hit.

Sheer Force.name: Sheer Force
Sheer Force.description: The Pokémon's moves lose their additional effects, but the power of those moves will be boosted by 30%.

Cud Chew.name: Cud Chew
Cud Chew.description: If the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will eat that same Berry once more at the end of the next turn.

Imposter.name: Imposter
Imposter.description: The Pokémon transforms into the Pokémon in front of it. It also copies all of that Pokémon's stats apart from its HP.

Water Absorb.name: Water Absorb
Water Absorb.description: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

Hydration.name: Hydration
Hydration.description: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions at the end of every turn in rain.

Volt Absorb.name: Volt Absorb
Volt Absorb.description: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

Quick Feet.name: Quick Feet
Quick Feet.description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Speed stat is boosted by 50%. Being paralyzed does not lower the Pokémon's Speed stat.

Pressure.name: Pressure
Pressure.description: Causes opponents to expend 1 more PP when using moves against the Pokémon.

Immunity.name: Immunity
Immunity.description: The Pokémon cannot be poisoned or badly poisoned.

Multiscale.name: Multiscale
Multiscale.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes while its HP is full.

Leaf Guard.name: Leaf Guard
Leaf Guard.description: The Pokémon is immune to status conditions in harsh sunlight.

Mega Sol.name: Mega Sol
Mega Sol.description: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

Frisk.name: Frisk
Frisk.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies opponents' held items.

Dragonize.name: Dragonize
Dragonize.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Insomnia.name: Insomnia
Insomnia.description: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

Plus.name: Plus
Plus.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

Sap Sipper.name: Sap Sipper
Sap Sipper.description: Grass-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Attack stat by 1 stage.

Damp.name: Damp
Damp.description: All Pokémon become unable to use explosive moves. Explosive Abilities also fail to trigger.

Drizzle.name: Drizzle
Drizzle.description: Summons rain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Curious Medicine.name: Curious Medicine
Curious Medicine.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes all stat changes from its allies.

Sturdy.name: Sturdy
Sturdy.description: If the Pokémon has full HP and takes damage from a move that would knock it out in one hit, it will endure the hit with 1 HP. The Pokémon is also immune to one-hit KO moves.

Overcoat.name: Overcoat
Overcoat.description: The Pokémon takes no damage from sandstorms and is immune to moves and Abilities involving powder.

Sand Force.name: Sand Force
Sand Force.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Rock-, Ground-, and Steel-type moves by 30% in a sandstorm.

Technician.name: Technician
Technician.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's moves by 50% if their power is 60 or less.

Skill Link.name: Skill Link
Skill Link.description: The Pokémon's multistrike moves always hit the maximum number of times.

Weak Armor.name: Weak Armor
Weak Armor.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, its Defense stat is lowered by 1 stage, but its Speed stat is boosted by 2 stages.

Stalwart.name: Stalwart
Stalwart.description: The Pokémon ignores the effects of Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Sand Stream.name: Sand Stream
Sand Stream.description: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.description: The Pokémon dodges attacks from its allies.

Pixilate.name: Pixilate
Pixilate.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Stall.name: Stall
Stall.description: The Pokémon's moves go last among moves of the same priority.

Prankster.name: Prankster
Prankster.description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon's status moves by 1 stage.

Filter.name: Filter
Filter.description: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from super-effective moves by 25%.

Pure Power.name: Pure Power
Pure Power.description: Doubles the power of the Pokémon's physical moves.

Minus.name: Minus
Minus.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat by 50% if an ally with the Plus or Minus Ability is also in battle.

Rough Skin.name: Rough Skin
Rough Skin.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker takes damage equal to 1/8 of its max HP.

Speed Boost.name: Speed Boost
Speed Boost.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Speed stat by 1 stage at the end of every turn.

Strong Jaw.name: Strong Jaw
Strong Jaw.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's biting moves by 50%.

Solid Rock.name: Solid Rock
Solid Rock.description: Reduces the damage the Pokémon takes from super-effective moves by 25%.

White Smoke.name: White Smoke
White Smoke.description: The Pokémon's stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or Abilities.

Marvel Scale.name: Marvel Scale
Marvel Scale.description: When the Pokémon has a status condition, its Defense stat is boosted by 50%.

Competitive.name: Competitive
Competitive.description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Sp. Atk stat is boosted by 2 stages.

Forecast.name: Forecast
Forecast.description: The Pokémon transforms with the weather to change its type to Water, Fire, or Ice.

Levitate.name: Levitate
Levitate.description: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses.

Super Luck.name: Super Luck
Super Luck.description: The Pokémon has a 1-stage Critical-Hit Ratio Boost.

Ice Body.name: Ice Body
Ice Body.description: The Pokémon has 1/16 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in snow.

Moody.name: Moody
Moody.description: At the end of every turn, one of the Pokémon's stats will be boosted by 2 stages, but another will be lowered by 1 stage.

Refrigerate.name: Refrigerate
Refrigerate.description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Iron Fist.name: Iron Fist
Iron Fist.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's punching moves by 20%.

Rivalry.name: Rivalry
Rivalry.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's moves by 25% against targets of the same gender, and lowers it by 25% against targets of the opposite gender. The power remains the same as usual if either Pokémon's gender is unknown.

Poison Point.name: Poison Point
Poison Point.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

Soundproof.name: Soundproof
Soundproof.description: The Pokémon is immune to sound-based moves.

Klutz.name: Klutz
Klutz.description: Items do not work when held by the Pokémon.

Infiltrator.name: Infiltrator
Infiltrator.description: When using its moves, the Pokémon ignores the effects of targets' Light Screen, Reflect, Aurora Veil, Safeguard, and substitutes.

Sand Veil.name: Sand Veil
Sand Veil.description: Boosts the Pokémon's evasiveness by 25% in a sandstorm.

Anticipation.name: Anticipation
Anticipation.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it senses whether the opponents know any one-hit KO moves or moves that are super effective against it.

Dry Skin.name: Dry Skin
Dry Skin.description: Water-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP. However, the Pokémon takes 25% more damage from Fire-type moves. The Pokémon has 1 /8 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn in rain, but it loses 1/8 of its max HP at the end of every turn in harsh sunlight.

Poison Touch.name: Poison Touch
Poison Touch.description: When the Pokémon hits a target with a contact move, the target has a 30% chance of being poisoned.

Pickpocket.name: Pickpocket
Pickpocket.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it will steal the held item of the attacker if it is not already holding an item.

Reckless.name: Reckless
Reckless.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's moves by 20% if they have recoil or crash damage.

Poison Heal.name: Poison Heal
Poison Heal.description: If poisoned or badly poisoned, the Pokémon has 1/8 of its max HP restored at the end of every turn instead of losing HP.

Sharpness.name: Sharpness
Sharpness.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's slicing moves by 50%.

Contrary.name: Contrary
Contrary.description: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

Unburden.name: Unburden
Unburden.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat when its held item is consumed or lost.

Sand Rush.name: Sand Rush
Sand Rush.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat in a sandstorm.

Piercing Drill.name: Piercing Drill
Piercing Drill.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

Healer.name: Healer
Healer.description: The Pokémon has a 50% chance of curing the status conditions of its allies at the end of every turn.

Mummy.name: Mummy
Mummy.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has its Ability changed to Mummy.

Stench.name: Stench
Stench.description: When the Pokémon deals damage with its moves, there is a 10% chance that targets will flinch.

Aftermath.name: Aftermath
Aftermath.description: Attackers that knock out the Pokémon with a contact move take damage equal to 1/4 of their max HP.

Illusion.name: Illusion
Illusion.description: The Pokémon enters battle disguised as the last Pokémon in its party. It reverts to its usual appearance when it takes damage from a move.

Motor Drive.name: Motor Drive
Motor Drive.description: Electric-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they boost its Speed stat by 1 stage.

Flame Body.name: Flame Body
Flame Body.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being burned.

Slush Rush.name: Slush Rush
Slush Rush.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat in snow.

Swift Swim.name: Swift Swim
Swift Swim.description: Doubles the Pokémon's Speed stat in rain.

Mimicry.name: Mimicry
Mimicry.description: The Pokémon's type changes depending on the terrain.

Unseen Fist.name: Unseen Fist
Unseen Fist.description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

Bulletproof.name: Bulletproof
Bulletproof.description: The Pokémon is immune to ball and bomb moves.

Magician.name: Magician
Magician.description: If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, it will steal the held item from targets it deals damage to with its moves.

Protean.name: Protean
Protean.description: Changes the Pokémon's type to the type of the move it's about to use. This works only once per time the Pokémon enters battle.

Pickup.name: Pickup
Pickup.description: If the Pokémon is not already holding an item, at the end of the turn it will pick up an item that was consumed by another Pokémon.

Cheek Pouch.name: Cheek Pouch
Cheek Pouch.description: The Pokémon has 1/3 of its max HP restored when it eats a Berry, in addition to the Berry's usual effect.

Gale Wings.name: Gale Wings
Gale Wings.description: Increases the priority of the Pokémon's Flying-type moves by 1 stage while its HP is full.

Shield Dust.name: Shield Dust
Shield Dust.description: The Pokémon is immune to additional effects from attacks.

Compound Eyes.name: Compound Eyes
Compound Eyes.description: Boosts the accuracy of the Pokémon's moves by 30%.

Friend Guard.name: Friend Guard
Friend Guard.description: Reduces the damage allies take by 25%.

Flower Veil.name: Flower Veil
Flower Veil.description: Grass-type allies are immune to status conditions and cannot have their stats lowered.

Symbiosis.name: Symbiosis
Symbiosis.description: When an ally consumes an item, the Pokémon gives its own held item to that ally.

Fairy Aura.name: Fairy Aura
Fairy Aura.description: Boosts the power of the Fairy-type moves of all Pokémon on the field by 33%.

Fur Coat.name: Fur Coat
Fur Coat.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from physical moves.

Stance Change.name: Stance Change
Stance Change.description: The Pokémon changes into its Blade Forme when it attacks and changes into its Shield Forme when it uses the move King's Shield.

Aroma Veil.name: Aroma Veil
Aroma Veil.description: The Pokémon and its allies cannot gain the Infatuated, Taunted, Unable to Repeat, Move Disabled, Healing Prevented, or Encore statuses.

Sweet Veil.name: Sweet Veil
Sweet Veil.description: The Pokémon and its allies cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

Gooey.name: Gooey
Gooey.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker's Speed stat is lowered by 1 stage.

Harvest.name: Harvest
Harvest.description: If the Pokémon has used a Berry, it has a 50% chance of creating another one at the end of every turn. In harsh sunlight, the Pokémon will definitely create a Berry.

Long Reach.name: Long Reach
Long Reach.description: None of the moves used by the Pokémon are considered contact moves.

Liquid Voice.name: Liquid Voice
Liquid Voice.description: The Pokémon's sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

Vital Spirit.name: Vital Spirit
Vital Spirit.description: The Pokémon cannot become drowsy or be put to sleep.

Merciless.name: Merciless
Merciless.description: The Pokémon's attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned or badly poisoned.

Stamina.name: Stamina
Stamina.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, its Defense stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Water Bubble.name: Water Bubble
Water Bubble.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and doubles the power of its Water-type moves. The Pokémon cannot be burned.

Corrosion.name: Corrosion
Corrosion.description: The Pokémon can poison or badly poison targets even if they're Steel or Poison types.

Queenly Majesty.name: Queenly Majesty
Queenly Majesty.description: Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

Receiver.name: Receiver
Receiver.description: The Pokémon changes its Ability to match that of a defeated ally.

Defiant.name: Defiant
Defiant.description: When the Pokémon has any of its stats lowered by an opponent, its Attack stat is boosted by 2 stages.

Disguise.name: Disguise
Disguise.description: When the Pokémon is in its Disguised Form and would take damage from a move, it loses 1/8 of its max HP instead of taking the damage, then changes into its Busted Form.

Berserk.name: Berserk
Berserk.description: Boosts the Pokémon's Sp. Atk stat by 1 stage when an attack causes its HP to drop to 1/2 or less of its max.

Mirror Armor.name: Mirror Armor
Mirror Armor.description: Instead of being affected by stat-lowering effects, the Pokémon bounces them back at whichever Pokémon caused them.

Ripen.name: Ripen
Ripen.description: Doubles the effects of Berries eaten by the Pokémon.

Hustle.name: Hustle
Hustle.description: When the Pokémon uses physical moves, its Attack stat is boosted by 50%, but its accuracy is lowered by 20%.

Sand Spit.name: Sand Spit
Sand Spit.description: Summons a sandstorm for 5 turns when the Pokémon takes damage from moves.

Screen Cleaner.name: Screen Cleaner
Screen Cleaner.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it removes the Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil statuses.

Wandering Spirit.name: Wandering Spirit
Wandering Spirit.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, it swaps Abilities with the attacker.

Hunger Switch.name: Hunger Switch
Hunger Switch.description: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode at the end of every turn.

Clear Body.name: Clear Body
Clear Body.description: The Pokémon's stats cannot be lowered by other Pokémon's moves or Abilities.

Purifying Salt.name: Purifying Salt
Purifying Salt.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Ghost-type moves. The Pokémon is immune to status conditions.

Electromorphosis.name: Electromorphosis
Electromorphosis.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it gains the Electric Boost status, which doubles the power of the next Electric-type move it uses.

Spicy Spray.name: Spicy Spray
Spicy Spray.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

Opportunist.name: Opportunist
Opportunist.description: When an opponent's stats are boosted, the Pokémon boosts its own stats in the exact same way.

Zero To Hero.name: Zero To Hero
Zero To Hero.description: The Pokémon changes into its Hero Form when it switches out of battle.

Earth Eater.name: Earth Eater
Earth Eater.description: Ground-type moves do not work on the Pokémon. Instead, they restore 1/4 of its max HP.

Toxic Debris.name: Toxic Debris
Toxic Debris.description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a physical move, it gives the opponent's side the Toxic Spikes status, which sets Toxic Spikes on their field.

Armor Tail.name: Armor Tail
Armor Tail.description: Opponents are unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

Supreme Overlord.name: Supreme Overlord
Supreme Overlord.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the power of its moves is boosted by 10% for each Pokémon in its party that has been defeated in the battle already. The maximum boost is 50%.

Hospitality.name: Hospitality
Hospitality.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it restores 1/4 of its ally's max HP.

Heatproof.name: Heatproof
Heatproof.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from Fire-type moves and from being burned.

Supersweet Syrup.name: Supersweet Syrup
Supersweet Syrup.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, opponents' evasiveness is lowered by 1 stage. This Ability is triggered only once per battle.

Sticky Hold.name: Sticky Hold
Sticky Hold.description: The Pokémon's held item cannot be stolen or removed by other Pokémon.

Effect Spore.name: Effect Spore
Effect Spore.description: When the Pokémon is hit by a contact move, the attacker has a 30% chance of being poisoned, paralyzed, or put to sleep.

Forewarn.name: Forewarn
Forewarn.description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it identifies the move with the highest power among all the moves the opponents know.

Suction Cups.name: Suction Cups
Suction Cups.description: The Pokémon is unaffected by the moves and held items of other Pokémon that would force it to switch out of battle.

Battle Armor.name: Battle Armor
Battle Armor.description: Attacks landed on the Pokémon will never be critical hits.

Fluffy.name: Fluffy
Fluffy.description: Halves the damage the Pokémon takes from contact moves, but doubles the damage taken from Fire-type moves.

Good As Gold.name: Good As Gold
Good As Gold.description: The Pokémon is immune to status moves used by other Pokémon.

Electric Surge.name: Electric Surge
Electric Surge.description: Turns the entire field into Electric Terrain for 5 turns when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Eelevate.name: Eelevate
Eelevate.description: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Fire Mane.name: Fire Mane
Fire Mane.description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon’s Fire-type moves by 50%.
